About.title: Your Trusted Partner in Paradise
About.description: We don't just sell properties. We navigate the complexities of international real estate so you can acquire your dream lifestyle with total peace of mind.
About.p1: Founded on the principles of absolute transparency and elite service, LASS Realty has grown into the Dominican Republic's most reliable luxury real estate boutique.
About.p2: Buying international property requires deep local knowledge and unshakeable trust. Our team holds over 15 years of combined experience exclusively in the Punta Cana, Cap Cana, and Bavaro markets. We understand the legal frameworks, the developer histories, and the neighborhood micro-economies.
About.p3: Whether you are searching for a high-yield investment condo or a sweeping oceanfront estate, our commitment remains the same: protecting your capital and delivering a frictionless acquisition experience.
About.legalSecurityDesc: We partner with top local attorneys for Title validation.
About.marketInsightDesc: Exclusive access to off-market luxury pockets.
About.recognized: Recognized as a Top 10 Luxury Brokerage in the Dominican Republic (2025).
About.vettedDesc: We reject 40% of the properties we review. We only list homes with pristine legal standing.
About.endToEndDesc: From viewing to closing to property management, we handle the entire lifecycle.
About.expertsDesc: Specializing in US, Canadian, and European investors buying in the DR.

BuyingGuide.title: A Guide to Buying in the Dominican Republic
BuyingGuide.subtitle: Everything you need to know about purchasing luxury real estate in Punta Cana and beyond as a foreigner.
BuyingGuide.step1Desc: Browse our handpicked portfolio of luxury villas, condos, and estates.
BuyingGuide.step2Desc: We negotiate the best possible price and terms on your behalf.
BuyingGuide.step3Desc: Our partner attorneys ensure the title is clean and taxes are paid.
BuyingGuide.step4Desc: Sign the contract and submit a 10% deposit into escrow.
BuyingGuide.step5Desc: Transfer the final funds and receive your title. Congratulations!
BuyingGuide.faq1Q: Can foreigners own property in the Dominican Republic?
BuyingGuide.faq1A: Yes! Foreigners enjoy the exact same property rights as Dominican citizens. There are no restrictions.
BuyingGuide.faq2A: Closing costs are generally around 3% of the property value, which includes a 3% transfer tax and minor notary fees.
BuyingGuide.faq3A: CONFOTUR is a tax incentive law that exempts qualifying new developments from the 3% transfer tax and gives 15 years of property tax (IPI) exemption.
BuyingGuide.ctaDesc: Reach out to our agents for a personalized consultation.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it—listen to the families and investors we've helped.

t1.quote: LASS Realty made our dream of owning a villa in Punta Cana a reality. Their team handled the entire legal and closing process seamlessly. Unmatched professionalism.

t2.quote: We were nervous about buying property overseas, but the agent was incredibly transparent and held our hand through every step. Highly recommended!

t3.quote: The property management post-sale has been phenomenal. Our luxury condo in Bavaro is consistently rented out when we aren't using it.
